failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG DES at 120°C leading to pump slippage or erratic flow rates
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement high-precision gear pumps with active flow monitoring

failure_modes.cause: Local hotspots or stagnant zones in 16m PFA coil leading to product decomposition
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure high-turbulence heat exchange or precise oil bath temperature control

failure_modes.cause: DES solvent causing seal degradation or crystallization in the BPR orifice
failure_modes.mitigation: Use chemically inert PTFE-seated BPR and implement a solvent flush cycle

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — crystallization/blockage leads to immediate overpressure or flow cessation
validation_experiments: Viscosity-Temperature Profile: Measure TBAB/EG DES viscosity from 20°C to 120°C to validate pump delivery accuracy
Long-term Stability Run: Operate at 120°C for 24 hours; analyze effluent for degradation products and monitor dP for fouling
BPR Stress Test: Cycle the system with DES solvent for 100 hours to check for seal leakage or orifice clogging
